oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Breeding by Parents at Loro Parque
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Padron, Rafael Zamora
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 47 Number 1 (December 2020).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Breeding by Parents at Loro Parque Fundación$W/RUR3DUTXH)XQGDFLyQZKHUHWKHODUJHVWOLYLQJJHQHWLFUHVHUYHRISDUURWVLQWKHZRUOGWDNHVSODFHWKH DYHUDJHDQQXDOUHSURGXFWLRQUHVXOWVLQDERXWFKLFNVRIWKHPRVWGLYHUVHVSHFLHV$OOZLWKVRPHGHJUHH RIWKUHDWLQQDWXUH7KURXJKRXWWKLV\HDUZHKDYHDOUHDG\H[FHHGHGDWKRXVDQGELUWKVZKLFKEHFRPHD WUXHVDIHW\QHWIRUHDFKRIWKHUHSUHVHQWHGVSHFLHV6RPHWLPHVWKHLQFXEDWLRQRUJURZWKRIWKHFKLFNVPXVWEHDVVLVWHGE\DX[LOLDU\WHFKQLTXHVVXFKDVDUWLILFLDO LQFXEDWLRQRUKDQG-UHDULQJZKLFKLPSOLHVORQJHUVXEVHTXHQWVRFLDOL]DWLRQSURFHVVHVXQWLOWKH\RXQJSDUURWV DUHFRPSOHWHO\LQGHSHQGHQW:HDUHKDSS\WRVKDUHWKDWEHWZHHQODVW\HDUDQGVRIDUWKLV\HDUPRUHWKDQ RIWKHFKLFNVKDYHEHHQUDLVHGE\WKHLUSDUHQWV$QDFKLHYHPHQWWKDWPDNHVXVLPPHQVHO\KDSS\VLQFH LWLVUHDOO\LPSRUWDQWWKDWWKHFKLFNVGHYHORSZLWKWKHLUSDUHQWV(VSHFLDOO\ZKHQLWFRPHVWRELUGVWKDWFDQEH UHLQWURGXFHGLQWRWKHZLOGLQRUGHUWRUHSRSXODWHFHUWDLQVSHFLHVWKDWDUHLQGDQJHURIH[WLQFWLRQ)RUWKLVUHD VRQLWLVYLWDOWKDWWKH\GLVFRYHUWKURXJKWKHLUSDUHQWVWKHFRUUHFWZD\WRHDWDQGFRPPXQLFDWHLQDGGLWLRQ WROHDUQLQJWKHFXVWRPVDQGEHKDYLRUVRIHDFKVSHFLHVClick the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
